Dialogues that demonstrate structured reasoning about invented parties and internally-consistent rules. Requires high-quality generators, so deferred.

T2b targets the reasoning goal: legal and argumentative exchanges whose logic is sound but whose parties, claims, and rules are invented and referent-free. Reliable generation needs stronger LLMs, so it is deferred and described here for later implementation.
